_comment: Generated by tools/modifier_registry_build.gd via scripts/body/modifier_registry.gd from the MakeHuman CC0 modifier JSON. DO NOT hand-edit; regenerate with `nix build .#modifier-registry`.

modifiers.name: head-age-decr|incr
modifiers.tooltip: Age of the facial features.

modifiers.name: penis-length-decr|incr
modifiers.label: Penis length
modifiers.tooltip: Length of the male genital (if proxy applied).

modifiers.name: penis-circ-decr|incr
modifiers.label: Penis circumference
modifiers.tooltip: Circumference or thickness of the male genital (if proxy applied).

modifiers.name: penis-testicles-decr|incr
modifiers.label: Testicles size
modifiers.tooltip: Size of the testicles of the male genital (if proxy applied).

modifiers.name: Gender
modifiers.label: Gender
modifiers.tooltip: Gender of the human (min is female, max is male).

modifiers.name: Age
modifiers.label: Age
modifiers.tooltip: Age of the human (range from 1 year to 90 years old, with center position 25 years).

modifiers.name: African
modifiers.label: African
modifiers.tooltip: African ethnicity of the human (the three ethnicity values are normalized so they sum to 100%).

modifiers.name: Asian
modifiers.label: Asian
modifiers.tooltip: Asian ethnicity of the human (the three ethnicity values are normalized so they sum to 100%).

modifiers.name: Caucasian
modifiers.label: Caucasian
modifiers.tooltip: Caucasian ethnicity of the human (the three ethnicity values are normalized so they sum to 100%).

modifiers.name: Muscle
modifiers.label: Muscle
modifiers.tooltip: Amount of muscle mass.

modifiers.name: Weight
modifiers.label: Weight
modifiers.tooltip: The weight of the human.

modifiers.name: Height
modifiers.label: Height
modifiers.tooltip: The height/length of the human.

modifiers.name: BodyProportions
modifiers.label: Proportions
modifiers.tooltip:
Proportions of the human features, often subjectively referred to as qualities of beauty
(min is unusual, center position is average and max is idealistic proportions).

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-apple
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Apple
modifiers.tooltip:
Undefined waist, chest and abdomen form a round silhouette.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-diamond
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Diamond
modifiers.tooltip:
Broader hips than shoulders, undefined waist and relatively small bust.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-full-hourglass
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Full Hourglass
modifiers.tooltip:
Most feminine body type: hips and bust are nearly equal in size, well-defined narrower waistline. Bottom and hips are rounded.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-neat-hourglass
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Neat Hourglass
modifiers.tooltip:
Lean body, hips and bust are nearly equal in size, well-defined narrower waistline.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-invert-triangle
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Inverted Triangle
modifiers.tooltip:
Broad shoulders and chest, narrow hips and bottom, less waist definition.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-lean-column
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Lean Column
modifiers.tooltip:
Straight skinny shape with chest, hips and waist are about the same width.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-rectangle
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Rectangle
modifiers.tooltip:
Straight shape with chest, hips and waist are about the same width.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-triangle
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Triangle
modifiers.tooltip:
Wide hips, narrow shoulders and a small waistline.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-adrenal
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Adrenal
modifiers.tooltip:
The adrenal glands are producing cortisol (a stress hormone). If too much is produced, protein needed for muscles is turned into sugar, which then is converted into belly fat.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-liver
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Liver
modifiers.tooltip:
If the liver is damaged, it could result in fluid belly.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-ovary
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Ovary
modifiers.tooltip:
A surplus of estrogen will gain fat in the areas it is produced and the surrounding areas, lower belly, hips, and thighs.

Target by Elvaerwyn

modifiers.name: bodyshapes-elvs-fem-thyroid
modifiers.label: Elvs Female Thyroid
modifiers.tooltip:
Thyroid hypofunction is slowing down metabolism which usually results in obesity.

Target by Elvaerwyn
